textByHash.47aadfb0645eb38d6989ab0c8f6b69d3798f536c: I'm on an expedition to try and extend the bounds of gnome knowledge. King Narnode has sent out a number of gnome explorers to map the furthest reaches of Gielinor.
textByHash.43f8f8615e850ba1e5ce0c99dccfcae2a16dfe16: Oh no, I enjoy it - I've always had itchy feet ever since I was a little gnome.
textByHash.8dd706215feea440de438e43c6836160907a1fe7: Oh, I like it - very peaceful. Avoiding those Trolls can be tricky though.
textByHash.b367c94383f796139ed9f3fc757f63ce19041acd: Gnomish mint cake is a great source of energy for the gnome traveller. It will give you that extra bit of zip when you are running out of steam.
textByHash.1567bec9a4c6e87cb230e770ef7a97b5bf9e3245: I need all the mint cake I have, I'm afraid.
textByHash.74dcba5325865339f8d575cc5bff7be050ef26b0: Ah, the seed pod of the Grand Tree is a fascinating spirit artefact. It is a very useful thing, though one must treat it with respect, since the Grand Tree has a connection with all of its parts, however distant they
textByHash.4e6a1289dc67f01d4e3f5b411e1491dc1adcf1fe: may be. How do you think the Spirit Trees work?
textByHash.dfcee23c4f18e88f160a1dd119187f4deba16f31: If you launch its seeds in a far flung location, you will be helping the tree survive, so the grand tree will help a gnome glider pilot find you, using the seed burst itself (which marks the sky) and a little magic, and bring you
textByHash.bac9b7e5770f68bf273350df3e064aaa1bc74dd0: back home as an act of gratitude. Budding farmers will also find their link with plants to be just a little bit better than before.
textByHash.8e723ca9e17106b500bb3d71d92902a49042a6d7: However, it takes time for a pilot to find you, and if you are in a real hurry, and I mean a real emergency, you can just squash the seed pod. The Grand Tree doesn't like this, but will pull you back
textByHash.3b0c0457659ea1ced3ad1333b1951326b4254c36: home straight away. Don't do this if you need to do anything with plants straight away, though - your fingers will be considerably less green for a while after using the seed pod this way, and the journey is not
textByHash.2eafee456da078708377e979aa98c52e2717b41d: I'm struggling with this, please help me solve it!
textByHash.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
textByHash.c75dc3d148e93dab4a9191c398670881145b1cb8: Brrrr. This will warm me up, I'm bored of snow and Troll food.
textByHash.c97a114f11742e45c8f49dee92e68c89437f63e6: Now that I have some proper food, I won't need this any more.
textByHash.1a137ea7b37e288491955116ff003969687e5805: Here, take these Grand Seed pods. Very useful in emergencies!
textByHash.010ef3e2c3f4fb9435f9131c7c46c2be42b1a6b6: I found this odd herb, maybe you can do something with it.
textByHash.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
